name: NORTHERN MINERALS & EXPLORATION LTD.
summary: Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd. is a Nevada-incorporated emerging natural resource company engaged in oil and gas production in central Texas and gold and silver exploration in northern Nevada. It operates through subsidiaries including Kathis Energy LLC (Texas oil and gas drilling) and ENMEX Operations LLC (Mexico real estate development), though both subsidiaries report no operational activity to date.

products.name: Oil and Gas Production
products.description: Oil and gas production operations in central Texas through subsidiary Kathis Energy LLC.

products.name: Gold and Silver Exploration
products.description: Exploration for gold and silver in northern Nevada.

products.name: Real Estate Development
products.description: Prospective real estate development projects in Mexico through ENMEX Operations LLC, with no activity to date.

partnerships.description: Limited partnership formed in Texas to raise funds from investors for oil and gas drilling projects.
